concept.title: Introduction to DITA
concept.shortdesc: This is a high level overviewo of Darwin Information Typing Architecture

copyright.copyrholder: This documentation project is free to redistribute and modify.

conbody.p: DITA (Darwin Information Typing Architecture) is an XML-based architecture used to create structured, reusable, and modular technical content.
DITA supports topic-based authoring, meaning each topic covers a single idea and can be reused across multiple deliverables.
conbody.note: DITA is widely used in software documentation, manufacturing, healthcare, and other industries.
